use_cases: Primary call-to-action triggers in forms and modals
State toggles with open/closed visual feedback
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with multiple style variants (primary, secondary, outline, ghost, dashed, mono, destructive) and appearance options. Supports hover states, focus-visible keyboard navigation, open state styling, and smooth color/box-shadow transitions. Built with class-variance-authority for flexible variant management and Base UI merge props for proper prop handling.
